text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho has been feeling down lately, so I
decide to take her to a shrine to cheer her up a
bit.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What are we doing here? Praying?
choice_data_list: You might feel better if you do.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess I might as well since we're here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho prays that she'll feel better soon.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Um... Please help me turn things around...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I want to become a great witch, just like Granny!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And also, I wanna make a spell that lets me win
races. Oh, and a spell to make Trainer a more
obedient familiar...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And I want that big stuffed animal I saw at the
mall the other day too! And I wanna eat lots of
sugar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And then... And then...
choice_data_list: Do you think that might be too much?
Do you think that might be too much?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You've got some nerve, interrupting your master
while she's praying.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Eh, oh well. I asked for everything I want! Now I'm
gonna be an even bigger genius magical girl!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What are you doing, Familiar? Let's go already!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look over there! Is that a cotton candy
stand?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
There are food stalls out even though there's no
event on? That's so lucky!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Don't just stand there spacing out! Go get
some cotton candy for me! Your treat, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I got to eat something sweet right away!
My prayers have been answered! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If all my wishes keep coming true like this, I'll be a
great witch in no time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hm-hm-hmmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit of a stretch to say that her prayers for
getting something sweet came true when she
basically forced it, but it looks like she's feeling
better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Caw, caw!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, what the heck?! Is that crow poop?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Crows are supposed to be witches' minions! What
are you thinking, doing something so rude to a
genius magical girl?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Familiar! Hurry up and get me a wet handkerchief!
And go buy me a change of clothes!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh, this is the worst!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This sudden stroke of bad luck has put an even
bigger damper on Sweep Tosho's mood.
